character.definition: used in a person's name, pensive
(same as 覷) to see; to look at, to steal a glance; to glance quickly, to spy on; to peep at
(same as standard form 餋) to worship; to honor by a rite or service; to offer sacrifices
a chemical element; old translation of (銪) Eu
to stop raining; to clear up, dispersion, a clear sky after rain
do, play or fiddle with; alley
to strive; to endeavor; Kangxi radical 205
to select; (Cant.) a wedge of a fruit such as an orange
